2606.25871.title: AutoRelAnnotator: Calibrated Model Cascades for Cost-Efficient Relevance Evaluation in Sponsored Search
2606.25871.paper_summary: How can we generate high-quality relevance annotations at scale without the cost and delays of human labeling? Relevance annotations are the backbone of search ranking systems which is needed for training data preparation, NDCG evaluation, and root cause analysis. However, human annotation is slow and off-the-shelf LLMs suffer from accuracy on domain-specific tasks. We propose a calibrated model cascade, a systematic approach for cost-efficient offline relevance annotation by routing queries through progressively larger fine-tuned classifiers. Our central insight is that accuracy and cost are orthogonal optimizations: domain-specific fine-tuning drives accuracy, cascading drives cost, and per-class isotonic calibration adds a small but reliable gain on top. Our contribution is threefold: (a) we decompose the gains and show that fine-tuning contributes 20 accuracy points while cascading is approximately accuracy-neutral but halves compute cost, (b) we introduce per-class isotonic calibration as one component of the cascade, contributing a small but statistically significant gain (+0.6 points over the strongest calibration baseline), and (c) we validate the system in production across six offline use cases, processing 150M+ annotations and enabling faster experimentation cycles. Our work is a building block for scalable, high-quality offline annotation pipelines in search and advertising systems.
2606.25871.paper_summary_zh: 如何在不增加人力標註成本和延遲的情況下大規模生成高質量的相關性標註？<lb/>相關性標註是搜索排名系統的基礎，這對於訓練數據準備、NDCG 評估和根本原因分析是必需的。<lb/>然而，人類標註的速度較慢，而現成的 LLM 在特定領域任務上的準確性較差。<lb/>我們提出了一個經過校準的模型級聯，這是一種通過逐步將查詢路由到越來越大的微調分類器來實現成本效益的離線相關性標註的系統方法。<lb/>我們的核心見解是，準確性和成本是正交的優化：特定領域的微調驅動準確性，級聯驅動成本，而每類的等距校準則在此基礎上增加了一個小但可靠的增益。<lb/>我們的貢獻有三個方面：（a）我們分解了增益，顯示微調貢獻了 20 個準確性點，而級聯則大約是準確性中立，但將計算成本減半；（b）我們將每類等距校準引入作為級聯的一個組成部分，貢獻了一個小但統計上顯著的增益（比最強的校準基準多 +0.6 點）；（c）我們在生產環境中驗證了該系統，涵蓋六個離線用例，處理了超過 1.5 億個標註並加快了實驗周期。<lb/>我們的工作是可擴展的高質量離線標註管道在搜索和廣告系統中的一個基礎組件。
2606.25871.author: Md Omar Faruk Rokon et.al.
2606.25871.authors: Md Omar Faruk Rokon, Shasvat Desai, Hong Yao, Kuang-chih Lee
